chinese_news.title: 消除“罪证”：给写作去除“AI味”的不完全手册（2026版）
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「有三思  U  Sense」

做个测试。读一下这段话：

“熊猫是最可爱的动物，它最爱吃竹子，样子最憨态可掬，是世界上最珍贵的宝藏。”

如果你笑了，或者皱了眉，很明显，你的“鉴AI雷达”已经觉醒。 

近期把网友笑到打鸣的“豆包体”里，“最”是高频词汇。大家纷纷晒出自己使用、调教AI，结果内容啼笑皆非的截图。这场围绕AI味写作的调侃就此出圈。

chinese_news.title: 用AI重构增长：新通教育集团的实践| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
新通教育创始人麻亚炜坦诚分享了过去五年的转型历程——从数字化基建到全员AI Must，从AI in All到AI Native新业务。她的实践证明：传统企业拥抱AI，最难的不是技术，而是让战略从董事会走到一线。

麻亚炜将AI转型划分为四个递进阶段：

第一阶段（2021-2022）：数字化基建 完成底层数据与系统架构的夯实，为AI应用奠定坚实基础。

第二阶段（2023-2024）：AI Must 战略落地 通过全员公开课普及认知、孵化标杆小组树立典范、赴哈佛与斯坦福验证产品，将AI从"命令"转化为"共识"。

第三阶段（2025）：AI in All 深度嵌入 将AI融入所有关键业务流程，构建覆盖全链路的"AI全家桶"与数字员工体系，实现效率与体验的双重跃升。

第四阶段（2026）：AI Native 原生创新 以AI原生思维开辟全新业务赛道，完成从"工具赋能"到"基因重塑"的质变。

核心启示： 真正的AI转型，不

chinese_news.summary:

广州因特智能科技有限公司孵化于西安电子科技大学广州研究院，是校企合作落地的典型科技企业。我们拒绝“纸上算法”，坚持软硬一体，为半导体、光通信、新能源三大领域提供高端检测装备，已服务国内头部客户及全球企业。

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：从“千人千面”到“人心洞察”| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
AIGC如何从生产工具进阶到情感洞察？当AI能写出剧本、生成音乐、表演微表情，人还剩什么？

内容产业正在发生生产模式跃迁，传统用户画像在AI时代正在被颠覆，真正要做的是理解用户的情感状态而非静态标签。厂牌效应不会消失，越过技术线之后，人最后坚守的是“手搓”的审美与意义。

chinese_news.title: 对话欧洲地图商TomTom：中国订单暴涨10倍，帮助中国辅助驾驶出海｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
中国汽车出海，离不开“地图”

当下，中国车企全球化进程正全面提速，出海已经从企业的可选增量，变为行业确定性增长主线。比亚迪、奇瑞等企业海外销量规模持续走高，小鹏、蔚来、理想、小米等新势力车企也纷纷发力海外高端市场。

区别于过往靠性价比、电动化优势打开市场的模式，现阶段中国车企出海的核心壁垒转变为智能化。在海外市场竞争中，智能座舱与高阶辅助驾驶，已经成为中国汽车差异化突围的关键。

智能座舱板块，导航是用户车机使用频次最高、感知最强的功能，直接决定座舱智能化的基础体验。不同于国内统一的道路规则与数据生态，海外各国的交通标识、道路拓扑、驾驶习惯、路况特征差异极大。

想要实现流畅的车道级导航、实时路况更新、新能源充电专属规划、多语言POI检索等基础服务，车企必须依托适配本地规则的地图数据。若无专业海外地图支撑，座舱智能化体验会出现明显短板，难以适配海外用户需求，直接影响产品竞争力。

辅助驾驶层面，地图的价值更是贯穿研发、适配、安全、合规全链条。一方面，车企海外智驾模型的迭代训练，需要海量真实的本

chinese_news.title: 京东加码商业地产，推出更高级大MALL
chinese_news.summary:
今年4月，京东开启“扫货式”拿地。

4月20日，京东花6.63亿竞得杭州钱江世纪城沿江商业用地；4月21日，京东在北京亦庄又花了17.57亿，拿下亦庄新城2宗商业金融用地；4月10日、11日，京东还在宿迁接连拿下两个地块，总价约3.69亿，总建筑面积高达57.2万平方米。单月斥资27.89亿元加仓。

就在很多人以为京东还是在玩老一套的时候，5月22日，京东官宣加码商业地产，推出了比京东MALL更高一级的产品：JD SPACE京东天地。

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 商汤国香投了一家消费级空间相机公司，为具身智能采集真实世界数据
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，消费级空间相机公司竹马创新近日完成了数千万天使+轮融资，本轮由商汤国香资本领投，鼎晖VGC、峰瑞资本跟投，深渡资本担任后续独家财务顾问。资金将主要用于产品研发、量产准备及海外市场拓展。

竹马创新成立于2025年11月，是一家以Camera + AI为核心的空间智能公司。公司希望定义一种新的AI硬件品类——空间相机：既是消费级3D内容创作工具，更是面向具身智能与世界模型的真实世界三维数据入口。

团队方面，创始人张吉曾任群核科技副总裁，深度参与大规模空间数据处理与商业化；首席科学家过洁为南京大学长聘副教授、3DGS和空间仿真领域顶尖科学家；团队具备从三维数据采集到云端计算、从算法到硬件的全栈能力。

据张吉介绍，公司首款产品Pebble，将3D Gaussian Splatting、多传感器融合、端云协同与AI原生交互封装进一台消费级设备，让用户像拍视频一样捕获真实三维世界，实现“所见即所扫、所扫即所得”。目前，产品仍在研发阶段，尚未量产。

随

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will WTI crude oil close below $65/barrel by 2026-07-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump-Iran deal momentum is collapsing oil prices; Jeff Currie warns Asia storage at minimum levels with U.S. shortage risk by July, creating binary trigger for bearish outcome.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Currie warning), BBC (Iran denies imminent deal), CoinDesk (oil slides on peace deal hopes)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVDA stock outperform SPY by >5% through 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Huawei chip design breakthrough threatens NVIDIA's AI dominance; Buterin/Ethereum Foundation pivot signals potential AI infra repricing across ecosystem.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Huawei new chips fall 2026), CoinDesk (Ethereum Foundation strategy shift), market consolidation around HYPE and AI agent infrastructure

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once by 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: PCE, jobless claims, and housing data this week will test Fed cut narrative; crypto market pricing in easing, oil deflation adds disinflationary pressure.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (PCE/jobless/housing week ahead), CNBC (Americans in financial stress, inflation dynamics), BTC/crypto price action rallying on peace deal/easing odds

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Delivery Hero be acquired by Uber at ≥€33/share by 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Uber formal takeover offer at €33 confirmed; shares rose 10% on news, showing market pricing in deal completion.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Delivery Hero shares +10%, Uber bid at €33/share confirmed)

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Large whale accumulation ($170M withdrawn from exchanges); XRP in declared 'value zone' near $1.40 amid broader crypto upside on geopolitical risk-off and potential Fed easing.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (XRP whale accumulation, value zone signal), CoinDesk (BTC/crypto up on peace deal odds, easing expectations)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. oil inventories fall below 390M barrels by 2026-07-15?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) weekly crude inventory report
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Currie's warning of July shortage is getting mainstream attention but prediction markets haven't priced the hard EIA data floor; storage crisis could be binary catalyst for energy/commodity repricing.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC Currie warning of Asia/Europe/U.S. minimum operating levels and imminent shortages; oil already down 7% on Iran deal noise.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Huawei release a new proprietary smartphone chip in production by 2026-11-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Huawei official product announcement + third-party supply chain verification (Gartner, TrendForce, or equivalent analyst firms)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market is sleeping on Huawei's chip autonomy threat to NVDA/AMD; fall launch timeline is concrete but few Western prediction markets have priced it.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Huawei new chip design announced, fall 2026 launch), broader U.S.-China semiconductor decoupling acceleration, NVIDIA earnings risk disclosure.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum's market cap exceed Bitcoin's market cap at any point between 2026-06-01 and 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or CoinGecko official market cap feeds at time of crossing
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Buterin's Ethereum Foundation pivot to 'CROPS' + Vitalik's ETH sell-down signal suggests internal confidence in alternative narrative; ETH/BTC ratio has room to run but rarely tested at this threshold.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Ethereum Foundation shrinking, selling less ETH, focus on CROPS), HYPE fund inflows (millions) while BTC/ETH ETF outflows accelerate, Hyperliquid emergence as alt venue.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Indonesia re-open access to Polymarket for retail traders before 2027-06-01?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Polymarket official status page + Indonesian financial regulator (OJK) public statement or enforcement action
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Indonesia just blocked Polymarket as 'online gambling'; regulatory reversal is unlikely but a trading desk hedge for Southeast Asia prediction market growth stories.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Indonesia blocks Polymarket), signals broader regulatory stance; if overturned, huge upside for HYPE/Hyperliquid and decentralized prediction infrastructure.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Trump administration reach a formal U.S.-Iran deal (including Strait of Hormuz opening) by 2026-08-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. State Department official press release + Iran's official IRNA news agency simultaneous confirmation
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump claims deal 'mostly negotiated' and 'announced soon' but Iran denies imminent deal (BBC); binary outcome drives oil, geopolitical risk, and crypto volatility—yet early-stage odds are volatile and mispriced.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Trump: deal proceeding nicely, will be announced soon), BBC (Iran: deal not imminent, contradicting U.S. narrative), Petraeus (Iran 'blinking'), CoinDesk (BTC/crypto up on peace deal odds).

investment_theses.thesis: Short oil (WTI crude) via DXY-long hedge; Trump-Iran deal narrative is collapsing the geopolitical risk premium while U.S. storage nears minimum levels, creating a near-term short squeeze followed by structural easing into 2H 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Oil down 7% on Trump's Iran deal announcement; Currie warns Asia storage at minimum, Europe next, U.S. shortage risk by July.
BBC: Iran denies imminent deal, undercutting Trump's narrative and reducing upside tail risk.
CoinDesk: BTC/crypto rallying on peace deal odds, indicating broad risk-on sentiment that will reverse if deal fails and inflation resurfaces.
investment_theses.counter_view: If U.S.-Iran deal actually materializes and Strait of Hormuz opens, supply shock could cause oil to spike short-term; geopolitical escalation (Israel-Hezbollah, Russia-Ukraine) could reignite energy premium.
investment_theses.expression: Short WTI crude via /CL futures or USO ETF; pair with long DXY (via UUP) for geopolitical de-risking; or use DBC (broad commodities) short to capture oil weakness without energy sector collateral damage.

investment_theses.thesis: Long HYPE (Hyperliquid) as macro bet on decentralized prediction market and trading infra capturing regulatory arbitrage from Polymarket's Indonesia ban and traditional exchange disintermediation.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Hyperliquid emerging as challenger to traditional exchanges and prediction markets per FalconX; HYPE funds attract millions as BTC/ETH ETF outflows accelerate.
CoinDesk: Indonesia blocks Polymarket as 'online gambling'—creates vacuum for decentralized alternatives.

CoinDesk: Prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi) seeing volume surge on political/geopolitical events (Iran, elections); if centralized venues face regulatory clamps, DEX-based alternatives gain share.
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory crackdown on prediction markets could extend to all venues, including DEX-based; HYPE is speculative and illiquid vs. spot BTC/ETH; Polymarket/Kalshi have brand moat and deep VCs backing regulatory defense.
investment_theses.expression: Long HYPE token directly (spot, if available); or use Hyperliquid perpetuals with leverage if venue offers; track HYPE fund flows and trading volume as proxy. Hedge with Polymarket/Kalshi binary market bets on U.S. regulatory clarity by 2026-12-31.

investment_theses.thesis: Rotate SPY long into NVDA short; Huawei's fall 2026 proprietary chip launch threatens NVIDIA's AI monopoly, while Ethereum Foundation's pivot and CROPS strategy redirect value away from traditional compute toward tokenized/distributed AI infra.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Huawei announced new chip design improving capabilities despite U.S. sanctions; launch scheduled fall 2026.

CoinDesk: Buterin signals Ethereum Foundation shrinking, selling less ETH, focusing on 'CROPS' (compute, resource, optimization, protocol, staking?)—suggests internal confidence in alt-compute narrative.
CoinDesk: HYPE funds (agent-economy infrastructure) attracting millions while BTC/ETH ETF outflows accelerate; points to macro shift in how investors value compute.
36Kr (China): TomTom reports Chinese auto export orders up 10x (AI-driven autonomous driving stack); Chinese chip autonomy gaining real commercial traction.
investment_theses.counter_view: NVDA's moat is in software ecosystem, CUDA, and ASIC design, not just FAB process; Huawei chip will face U.S. export restrictions on tools/IP; NVIDIA likely to grow margins via AI training monopoly and not suffer near-term EPS hit.
investment_theses.expression: Long SPY; short NVDA via put spread (e.g., sell 2026-10 $200 put, buy $180 put, collect premium) or direct short; or trade NVDA/SPY pairs ratio (short NVDA, long $SPY equal-weight). Monitor NVDA earnings (Q2 2026, likely late May) for guidance on AI chip competition risk.

investment_theses.thesis: Long gold (GLD) as Fed easing trade; PCE/jobless/housing data this week + Trump-Iran geopolitical de-risking will likely result in at least one rate cut by September 2026, inverting the 2025 rate-hike cycle and driving real yields negative.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: PCE, jobless claims, and housing data this week test Fed cut hopes; crypto markets pricing in easing.
CNBC: Americans entrenched in financial stress (inflation, debt); policy tailwinds for rate cuts emerging.
CoinDesk: BTC/crypto prices up on U.S.-Iran peace deal odds (risk-off geopolitical premium), signaling macro hedge demand.
36Kr/Caixin: No direct Chinese inflation headline today, but tech/AI spending acceleration suggests stagflation risks are receding.
investment_theses.counter_view: Core inflation remains sticky; Fed may hold rates through 2026; geopolitical escalation (Israel, Russia) could force a safe-haven bid in USD (DXY up) and depress gold; gold is already up YTD and forward-looking.
investment_theses.expression: Long GLD (SPDR Gold ETF) for broad exposure; or long GLD/short DXY pairs trade (gold outperforms dollar in easing cycle); or use gold futures (/GC) with 2-3x leverage if 90-day horizon is preferred. Size small—tail risk remains on sticky inflation.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC relative to altcoins (long BTC/ETH ratio, short ALT cap-weighted index); geopolitical risk-off (Iran deal, Middle East de-escalation) reduces haven demand for tokenized AI/compute plays, and Ethereum Foundation's capital redeployment signals internal pivot away from ETH value accrual.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: BTC/crypto prices up on peace deal odds—suggests BTC is benefiting from macro risk-on, not fundamental crypto thesis.
CoinDesk: Buterin/Ethereum Foundation selling less ETH + shifting to CROPS; if ET Foundation holds ~4.5M ETH, slower selling reduces future supply pressure.
Cointelegraph: XRP whales accumulating ($170M from exchanges); suggests smart money rotating into legacy alts, leaving ETH/high-multiple tokens vulnerable.
CoinDesk: HYPE funds attracting millions while BTC/ETH ETF outflows accelerate—divergence suggests retail/passive flows leaving while informed traders rotate to tokenized infra.
investment_theses.counter_view: ETH has Merge (staking), Shanghai (blob scaling), Dencun (rollup cost reduction) momentum; Ethereum Foundation pivot could be noise; altcoin cycle typically outperforms BTC in risk-on macro; AI agent infrastructure (HYPE, SOL) could reaccumulate.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot + short ETH spot (equal notional); or buy BTC perps (3-5x leverage, 30-day funding) and short ETH perps; or trade BTC/ETH ratio directly (if venue supports it). Tighten stops at BTC/ETH < 0.025 (current ~0.027 range) to protect against altcoin rally.
